hero.subtitle: Enterprise grade AI infrastructure you own and control. From LLM APIs to full stack agentic solutions choose the engagement model that fits your business.

about.heading: Intelligence Built for Growth
about.subtitle: Whether you're a startup, SME, or large enterprise we have the right engagement model for your stage and scale.

inference.title: Inference
inference.desc: Access Xarka's proprietary LLM stack via simple API calls. No infrastructure overhead, no model training, no DevOps headaches just powerful, sovereign AI on tap. Whether you're building a product, running experiments, or scaling to millions of requests, our inference layer gives you the raw capability you need without the operational complexity that usually comes with it.
inference.f1: Low-latency API responses keep your applications fast and responsive at any scale.
inference.f2: Sovereign data handling ensures your inputs and outputs never leave your jurisdiction.
inference.f3: Built-in usage analytics and monitoring give you full visibility into every API call and token consumed.
inference.f4: Pay-as-you-go pricing means you only pay for what you use, with no upfront commitment.

paas.title: PaaS
paas.desc: Agentic AI solutions tailored to solve specific business problems and enhance productivity across your organization. We design, deploy, manage, and continuously optimize your AI agents so you never have to think about uptime, drift, or model updates. Your team stays focused on business outcomes while we keep the intelligence running behind the scenes.
paas.f1: Custom agentic workflows are designed around your exact processes, not the other way around.
paas.f2: Managed deployment means we handle all the infrastructure so your team stays focused on outcomes.
paas.f3: 24/7 monitoring with proactive alerts ensures your AI systems stay reliable around the clock.
paas.f4: Continuous optimization keeps your agents improving as your business data and needs evolve.

bot.title: BOT
bot.desc: Full stack AI infrastructure designed, built, and deployed on your own premises. We handle everything from architecture to execution, then hand over complete ownership models, data pipelines, fine-tuned weights, and all intellectual property. After transfer, your team operates entirely independently with no ongoing dependency on Xarka, no licensing fees, and no external points of failure.
bot.f1: On-premise deployment puts the entire AI stack inside your own infrastructure and security perimeter.
bot.f2: Full IP ownership means every model, dataset, and workflow belongs entirely to your organization.
bot.f3: Team training is included so your staff can confidently operate and extend the system after handover.
bot.f4: Zero vendor lock-in guarantees you are never dependent on Xarka to keep your AI running.

product.heading: LawgicHub
product.subtitle: AI Powered Legal Intelligence Platform. A comprehensive platform designed for modern professionals where every feature is purpose built to accelerate high stakes outcomes.

solutions.heading: Deep Domain
solutions.subtitle: Three industries where sovereign AI creates transformative impact each with pre-built models and domain specific fine tuning.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Smart city monitoring, construction optimization, and predictive maintenance for critical infrastructure.

fintech.title: Fintech
fintech.description: Alternative credit scoring, fraud detection, and regulatory compliance automation for financial services.

pharma.title: Pharma
pharma.description: Drug discovery acceleration, clinical trial optimization, and pharmacovigilance with real-time analysis.

whyXarka.heading: Modular. Defensible. Built Different.
whyXarka.subtitle: Six pillars that make Xarka fundamentally different composable architecture, unbreakable security, and zero vendor lock-in.

p1.title: Self-Hosted Infrastructure & LLM Stack
p1.subtitle: Your Premises. Your Engine.
p1.desc: Complete on-premises deployment with no cloud dependency air-gapped for classified environments. Built on proprietary models from 4Bn to 1Tn parameters, with a 3-layer stack (OCR + Embedding + Text LLM), each independently upgradeable. Multi-agentic orchestration with full hardware and network control.

p2.title: Enterprise Security
p2.subtitle: ISO 27001 · ISO 42001 · SOC 2 · GDPR
p2.desc: End-to-end encryption at rest and in transit with client-managed keys. Comprehensive audit trails for every inference and data access. SOC 2 Type II compliance for security, availability, and confidentiality.

p3.title: Sovereign AI
p3.subtitle: India's Intelligence. India's Control.
p3.desc: 100% Indian-origin AI no foreign model dependencies. Aligned with India's National AI Strategy and data localization policies. Strategic asset for government, defense, and critical infrastructure.

p4.title: Modular Architecture
p4.subtitle: Pick only what you need.
p4.desc: Deploy OCR, embeddings, text LLM, or the full stack your choice. From single-server POC to multi-node production clusters. RESTful and gRPC APIs for seamless enterprise integration.

p5.title: Custom Fine-Tuning
p5.subtitle: Your data. Your model.
p5.desc: Domain specific fine tuning on proprietary data without upstream dependency. Custom training without catastrophic forgetting. Dedicated engineering team for deployment and knowledge transfer.

p6.title: Hardware Agnostic
p6.subtitle: No hardware lock-in.
p6.desc: Runs on NVIDIA GPUs, or custom accelerators. Scale up or down on demand cloud, on prem, or hybrid. Optimized inference pipelines for maximum throughput per dollar.

rajat.bio: Driving the overarching strategic direction and technological roadmap of XArka AI Technologies, he is dedicated to building a defensible and sovereign AI infrastructure for modern enterprises..

rishi.bio: Steers Xarka’s commercial and financial strategy, forming strategic partnerships within the legal ecosystem and aligning product development with market demand and revenue goals to scale global impact.

sharad.bio: Leading core product architecture and innovation while bridging deep-tech capabilities with real-world industry applications, and overseeing platform execution, AI workflows, and engineering operations.

kumud.bio: Driving enterprise SaaS user acquisition, market expansion, and GTM strategy while building strategic institutional partnerships and leading pilot deployments for Xarka’s nuanced deployment models.

harshal.bio: Leads the architecture and development of intelligent AI systems, designing scalable LLM and multi-agent solutions that power and optimize Arka's flagship engine.

chandan.bio: Leads the design and development of intelligent, scalable software powered by AI and Machine Learning, driving the integration and optimization of advanced AI capabilities within our flagship systems.

careers.subtitle: We're a small, fast-moving team solving meaningful problems at the intersection of AI and industry. If you thrive in ambiguity and want to shape a category, we want to hear from you.
